MiningAndRefining_1.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998: NSLOCTEXT("", "81196D75454CFE70FBD2D2BDFAA44341", "Refining allows you to turn resources into others - the Makeshift Smelter will refine Scrap into Building Materials. Interacting (LMB) with some objects, like the Smelter, will open the Info Panel. It can be closed with (RMB). This Facility will produce one unit of Building Materials for every two units of Scrap deposited, as well as one unit of Biomass for fuel, as shown in the Refining element of the Info Panel. Press Next to learn how to use the Hotbar, the first step towards getting items into the Smelter.")

MiningAndRefining_2.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998: NSLOCTEXT("", "EE79A51D44D58544337C1D903187DEF4", "The Hotbar is located along the bottom of the screen. You can assign items to your Hotbar in your Inventory to throw them. Press a number key (1-9) while hovering over an item to assign it to that Slot. Use that number key to then select that Hotbar Slot. You can also scroll through Hotbar Slots with (MMB Scroll). With a filled Hotbar Slot selected, you can throw the item towards the mouse cursor location with (R). Holding (R) throws repeatedly, and throwing speed increases over time. Press Next to learn how to get items into the Smelter.")

MiningAndRefining_3.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998:
NSLOCTEXT("", "61645CCA405A2741360D5C9F2AE6514E", "To add items to a <Important>Facility</> you will need to use its <Important>Intake</>.

These often look like open boxes attached to the <Important>Facility</> - in the case of the <Facility>Smelter</>, you just need to drop items directly into it.

Putting items into an <Important>Intake</> adds them to the <Important>Facility's Inventory</>, where they will be processed in the selected <Important>Refining Recipe</> when the requirements have been met.")

MiningAndRefining_4.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998: NSLOCTEXT("", "2F8909A041DF6C5C31A43C81D3174669", "Facilities may have multiple Refining Recipes available, and you will unlock new Recipes during the course of the game. You can select your desired Recipe from the scrollable list - for the Smelter though, there is currently only one Recipe available. You can take an item from a Facility by clicking its icon (LMB) in the Inventory section of the Info Panel. Deposit at least two Scrap into the Intake, along with one Biomass, and then pick up the Building Materials that are created to progress.")
